text_block_list.text:
One day, as I'm walking by the training track, a
conversation between two Umamusume in the
distance catches my attention.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That's enough. Training any more would be
pointless.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
No, it wouldn't! Why would you say that?! If I
don't train more, I'll—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You would continue pushing yourself, even if it
means injuring your leg?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Cast aside the panic you're feeling toward your
upcoming debut and have your leg properly
examined.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You can think about training after that. If you
need advice then, I would be glad to provide
some.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Air Groove... Thank you so much.

Her fury quelled, the younger Umamusume bows
to Air Groove before leaving.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. It is my given duty as the Empress to lead
the others. I'm not here to put on a show.
choice_data_list: Are you always so tough on them?
Are you always so tough on them?

You're always watching them very closely,
aren't you?

You're always watching them very closely,
aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. It is my given duty as the Empress to lead
the others. I'm not here to put on a show.
choice_data_list: Are you always so tough on them?
Are you always so tough on them?

You're always watching them very closely,
aren't you?

You're always watching them very closely,
aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...I shall answer this only once so that it may
benefit the racer you've partnered with. The
answer is, "No."

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Each Umamusume has dreams she will never give
up on... and aspects of herself she won't
compromise on.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Observing these two points carefully is the first
step to guiding them.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
One must be flexible and adapt. I wouldn't be the
Empress otherwise.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
We're done here. You'd best return to your own
tasks.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You fool. Do you know who you're talking to?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
As the Empress, how do you think I would be able
to guide others if I didn't devote my earnest
attention to each individual?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I won't stand for such insolence next time. Watch
yourself and consider the person you're speaking
to before you open your mouth.
